exam.description: From programming to general theory, the platform provides full support. Built-in LaTeX and Markdown editors make creating and answering questions equally smooth.

paper.title: Paper Question Integration (Online Exam)

teacher.description: Intuitive grading panel, real-time proctoring dashboard, and detailed grade statistics allow teachers to focus on teaching rather than administration.
teacher.title: Friendlier Teacher System

footer.copyright: © 2024 Online Judge. Built with a modern design system.

hero.subtitle: A high-quality testing environment built for academic settings. Integrating AI proctoring, paper-based questions, and real-time evaluation, ensuring every exam is fair, efficient, and in-depth.

highlights.item5: Modern UI built on IBM Carbon

lab.label: Lab Practice

modes.title: Supports Multiple Contest and Learning Modes

antiCheat.description: Full-range browser-based detection allows examinees to enter a strict proctoring environment without any plugins or software. We defend every effort and ensure absolute fairness in every test.

proctoring.aiDesc: Automated detection of suspicious behaviors using advanced vision models.
proctoring.fullscreenDesc: Mandatory fullscreen mode; exiting will trigger a warning or lock.
proctoring.multiScreenDesc: Ensures the student is only using a single authorized monitor.
proctoring.noCopyDesc: Prevents unauthorized content transfer through copy/paste actions.
proctoring.screenDesc: Continuous screen capture to prevent unauthorized resources during the exam.
proctoring.tabSwitchDesc: Real-time detection and logging of browser tab switches.
proctoring.videoDesc: Real-time webcam monitoring to verify student identity and environment.

antiCheat.title: No Installation Needed, Industry-Leading Anti-Cheat Technology

paper.description: Support for single choice, multiple choice, true/false, and short answer questions. Built-in Markdown and LaTeX editors accurately render complex mathematical formulas and technical documents, meeting diverse needs from general education to science and programming.
paper.title: More than just code, a complete online testing system

teacher.description: We have redefined the digital grading experience. An intuitive three-column grading panel, real-time proctoring dashboard, and automated results statistical analysis can save over 70% of management and grading time.
teacher.title: Focus on teaching, leave the rest to us

seo.description: An online exam and evaluation platform designed for education, supporting 20+ programming languages, diverse question types, and strict anti-cheating monitoring.
seo.title: Online Judge | Secure & Stable Online Exam Platform
